keywordspec.name: lge.auto.Uart
keywordspec.doc: The `Uart` Class can send string to some serial port. And this Class has a thread for recvie and save uart data. So this class can save a log file.

kw.name: Add Uart Port
kw.doc:
Add uart port
argument: - ``port`` : Uart port ex)COM1 , /dev/ttyUSB0 - ``bps`` : Uart Bytes per second ex) 115200 - ``logFilePath`` : Uart log file path
Examples: | `Add Uart Port` | COM1 | 115200 | ${LOG PATH}\log.txt |

kw.name: Close Uart Port
kw.doc:
disconnect uart port
Examples: | `Close Uart Port` |

kw.name: Connect Uart Port
kw.doc:
Connect uart port
argument: - ``port`` : Uart port ex)COM1 , /dev/ttyUSB0 - ``bps`` : Uart Bytes per second ex) 115200
Examples: | `Connect Uart Port` | COM1 | 115200 |

kw.name: Send Char to Uart
kw.doc:
send character to connected uart port It's not include endLine ( )
argument: - ``char`` : character
Examples: | `Send String to Uart` | s |
kw.shortdoc: send character to connected uart port It's not include endLine ( )

kw.name: Send Control Character
kw.doc:
send special character to connected uart port. example Ctrl-C
argument: - ``control_character`` : ETX or Ctrl-C
Examples: | `Send Control Character` | Ctrl-C |
kw.shortdoc: send special character to connected uart port. example Ctrl-C

kw.name: Send String to Uart
kw.doc:
send string to connected uart port
argument: - ``command`` : linux commad ex)ls -al
Examples: | `Send String to Uart` | ls -al |
kw.shortdoc: send string to connected uart port
